source: Generative Adversarial Text to Image Synthesis.pdf

concepts.finding: GANs conditioned on text embeddings can generate convincing 64x64 images from natural language descriptions, using a character-level text encoder to capture fine-grained textual details.
concepts.implication: Text-to-image synthesis demonstrates that text embeddings can capture fine-grained visual semantics, relevant for understanding how query representations encode visual product attributes.
concepts.open_question: How detailed are query embeddings at capturing visual vs. functional attributes?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Query embeddings trained on e-commerce search logs will encode visual attributes with lower fidelity than functional attributes, as measured by attribute prediction probes.
